/usr/bin/cc -std=c11 -Wall -Wextra -Werror -g  -rdynamic CMakeFiles/gamma.dir/src/memory_util.c.o CMakeFiles/gamma.dir/src/stack.c.o CMakeFiles/gamma.dir/src/gamma_main.c.o CMakeFiles/gamma.dir/src/gamma.c.o CMakeFiles/gamma.dir/src/parser.c.o CMakeFiles/gamma.dir/src/interactive.c.o CMakeFiles/gamma.dir/src/int_to_string_util.c.o CMakeFiles/gamma.dir/src/interactive_input_util.c.o  -o gamma
